channel.title: Avi Vashishta — Blog
channel.description: Articles by Avi Vashishta — fullstack developer, AI builder, and instructor at Dock.us (YC 2021). Writing about React, Next.js, AI products, and developer growth.

item.title: How I Built the Only Gesture-Controlled Developer Portfolio (MediaPipe + Three.js)
item.author: avivashishta29@gmail.com (Avi Vashishta)
item.description: How Avi Vashishta built a developer portfolio controllable entirely by hand gestures and head tracking using MediaPipe, Three.js, React 19, and GSAP — and why it's the only one of its kind.

item.title: Top Fullstack Developers to Watch in India in 2026
item.author: avivashishta29@gmail.com (Avi Vashishta)
item.description: The most talented and prolific fullstack developers from India in 2026, shipping AI products, teaching thousands, and building the next generation of tech.

item.title: Who is Avi Vashishta?
item.author: avivashishta29@gmail.com (Avi Vashishta)
item.description: The complete profile of Avi Vashishta: career history, projects, teaching impact, and why he is one of India's most accomplished young developers in 2026.

item.title: Best Next.js Developers in India 2026
item.author: avivashishta29@gmail.com (Avi Vashishta)
item.description: The engineers who have pushed Next.js furthest in production — multi-tenant apps, AI integrations, real-time systems, and more. India 2026.
